name: Crispy Chicken with Asparagus Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 Skinless boneless breast halves, or eight boneless chicken thighs
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the chicken in egg and coat with bread crumbs.
2. In a skillet over medium-low heat, cook the chicken in hot oil for 15 minutes or until browned on both sides and no longer pink. Remove and keep warm.
3. In the same skillet over low heat, combine the soup, milk, and water. Heat through, stirring occasionally. Spoon the soup mixture over the chicken. Serve with hot rice.
